title: AH-Sniper
description: Client-side Hypixel SkyBlock AH assistant that highlights newly listed BIN deals with configurable alerts.
body:
# AH-Sniper

AH-Sniper is a client-side assistant for the Hypixel SkyBlock Auction House.  
It monitors newly listed BIN auctions through the public Hypixel API and highlights potential deals using configurable filters.

## Features

- Real-time AH scanning using `https://api.hypixel.net/v2/skyblock/auctions`
- Variant-aware price comparison (stars, category/tier, enchant/ability signatures)
- Configurable filters:
- Minimum profit
- Minimum gap vs previous cheapest BIN
- Maximum buy price
- Poll interval
- In-game HUD status overlay
- In-game config panel (`/ahsniper panel` or press `P`)
- Alert system:
- Chat alerts
- Sound alerts
- Optional Discord webhook notifications

## Commands

- `/ahsniper`
- `/ahsniper panel`
- `/ahsniper toggle`
- `/ahsniper minprofit <millions>`
- `/ahsniper mingap <millions>`
- `/ahsniper maxbuy <millions>`
- `/ahsniper interval <ms>`
- `/ahsniper alerts`
- `/ahsniper webhook set <url>`
- `/ahsniper reload`

## Requirements

- Minecraft `1.21.11`
- Fabric Loader `0.18.2+`
- Fabric API
- Java `21`

## Notes

- Client-side mod.
- Not affiliated with Hypixel.
- Uses public Hypixel API endpoints for market data.
- Discord webhook is optional and only used if configured by the player.
- Informational helper only: all buying actions are manual.
